ां ची-834001य [फ .यसां.यपी-11012/3/2011-ईएसडी] जी. एस.ययक्ष्यकी ,यउपयकह ख् िेिकी -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF STATISTICS AND PROGRAMME IMPLEMENTATION NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st May, 2017 S.O. 1378(E).—In partial modification of the notification dated 7th November 2016 [File No. P-11012/3/2011- ESD], published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) under sections 3 and 4 of the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 (7 of 2009) read with rules 5 and 7 of the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011, the list of the Statistics Officers in the Schedule-II for the Annual Survey of Industries, 2015-16 is revised as below: SCHEDULE-II Sl.
